title: Redeeming airline miles may feel harder than ever — here's why your points won't go far anymore
summary: Travellers are increasingly using air miles to book multiple flights, offsetting rising ticket prices and cancellations. Flexible reward programmes were seeing a surge in demand, but miles no longer stretch as far as they once did. Here's why.

title: New NPS exit rules explained: Retiring soon? How much you can withdraw and when
summary: The National Pension System has updated withdrawal rules, allowing more flexibility for subscribers until 2026. Government employees exiting prematurely must use 80% of their accumulated pension wealth for an annuity, while those with an APW of ₹5 lakh or less can withdraw fully in a lump sum.

title: Can American customers expect any benefit as US companies seek tariff refunds?
summary: The US government has launched the CAPE portal for businesses to apply for tariff refunds after SCOTUS deemed Trump's tariff regime illegal. However, companies are unlikely to pass on the benefit to Americans.

title: Senior Citizen Savings Scheme vs Fixed Deposits: Which gives better interest rates over five-year investment period?
summary: Among the safest investment tools in India, bank deposits and the government's Senior Citizen Savings Scheme (SCSS) are the preferred choice for retired investors seeking steady payouts and guaranteed returns.

title: Direct funds vs regular funds: Differences, key things to remember, and which option investors should choose
